actions.summary: Introduce a short-trace boundary curriculum before any broader decode claims.
actions.rationale: All 8 cases fail at target token 0, so the next run must learn the prompt-to-trace transition before long-trace behavior matters.
planned_changes: Add an explicit first-target-token eval metric and report it every epoch.
Train on 1-, 8-, 32-, and 128-target-token slices before reusing the current 256-target-token cap.
Oversample trace starts whose first target token is `<step>` to make the boundary objective explicit.
success_criteria: Validation first-target exactness reaches 100% (2/2 cases) before broader decode evaluation is treated as meaningful.

actions.summary: Increase training budget and checkpoint cadence enough to observe a learning curve.
actions.rationale: The first run only used one step, one epoch, and 1,024 supervised target tokens, so there is no meaningful optimization sweep yet.
planned_changes: Increase the next reference run from 1 epoch to at least 8 epochs.
Emit validation telemetry after every epoch instead of only at the terminal run boundary.
Persist one checkpoint per epoch so failure analysis can compare early vs later learning.
success_criteria: Aggregate validation target exactness materially exceeds the current 13 bps baseline.
Per-epoch telemetry shows monotonic improvement on the first-target and first-32-token metrics.

actions.summary: Expand the trainable surface if the boundary curriculum still fails.
actions.rationale: If a longer run with a short-trace curriculum still cannot learn the first target token, output-head-only training is too weak for this lane.
planned_changes: Unfreeze token embeddings for the next run if boundary_curriculum_v1 and optimizer_budget_v1 do not clear the first-target gate.
If needed after that, add one small trainable mixer above the deterministic lookup state while keeping the claim boundary next-token-only.
success_criteria: At least one validation case becomes exact over the full predicted suffix.

actions.summary: Hold Phase 10 and Phase 11 behind stronger 4x4 evidence.
actions.rationale: There is no value in neural hull-cache or 9x9 scale-out while the 4x4 model still fails at target token 0.
planned_changes: Do not advance the trained-model hull-cache issue until validation first-target exactness is 100%.
Do not advance the 9x9 issue until validation first-32-target-token exactness exceeds 9,000 bps and at least one 4x4 validation case is fully exact.
success_criteria: Phase 10 begins only after the 4x4 lane has passed the boundary gate.
Phase 11 begins only after the 4x4 lane has passed the short-trace exactness gate.
